headline: Becton Dickinson Product Launches Aim To Deepen Recurring Hospital Revenue
summary: Becton Dickinson (NYSE:BDX) received FDA clearance for its Surgiphor 1000mL antimicrobial irrigation system, expanding its surgical solutions portfolio. The company also launched the BD Vacutainer Urine Complete Cup Kit, targeting improvements in urine collection and diagnostic workflows. These launches focus on patient safety, workflow efficiency and diagnostic accuracy across surgical and lab settings. Becton Dickinson operates in medical devices, diagnostics and interventional products,...
